Heroic Challenge
Ice Keeper Amulet

The unit restores 10% health every second for the duration of the battle. Once in a while, the amulet owner increases their incoming healing by 50% for 4 sec and binds themself to an ally with the lowest health for 4 sec. During this time, 100% of healing the unit receive is duplicated to each other while the bond is active. Also, one random debuff is removed from each bound unit every second during 4 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
